name: Sharpness
description: Doubles or halves the rate at which your weapon loses Sharpness.

armorSkills.skillDescription: Halves the rate at which your weapon loses Sharpness
Doubles the rate at which your weapon loses Sharpness

name: Handicraft
description: Increases your weapon's Sharpness Level.

name: Fencing
description: Prevents your attacks from being deflected.

name: Recoil
description: Bowgun recoil is reduced or increased.

armorSkills.skillDescription: Bowgun recoil is reduced.
Bowgun recoil is reduced further.
Bowgun recoil is reduced even greater.
Bowgun recoil is increased.
Bowgun recoil is increased further.
Bowgun recoil is increased even greater.

name: NormalS Up
description: Increases the damage of Normal S.

name: PierceS Up
description: Increases the damage of Pierce S.

name: PelletS Up
description: Increases the damage of Pellet S.

name: Normal S+
description: Allows a bowgun to fire all Normal S levels.

name: Pierce S+
description: Allows a bowgun to fire all or Lv1 Pierce S.

armorSkills.skillDescription: Allows a bowgun to fire Pierce S Lv1.
Allows a bowgun to fire all Pierce S level.

name: Status
description: Increases or decreases the potency of Abnormal Status attacks.

armorSkills.skillDescription: Increases the potency of Abnormal Status attacks.
Decreases the potency of Abnormal Status attacks.

name: Elemental
description: Increases or decreases the power of Elemental attacks.

armorSkills.skillDescription: Increases the power of Elemental attacks.
Decreases the power of Elemental attacks.

name: Hearing
description: Unaffected by some or all monster roars.

armorSkills.skillDescription: Unaffected by some monster roars (anything besides Elder Dragons, Gigginox, Deviljho, and Diablos).
Unaffected by all monster roars.

name: Fate
description: Chance of increasing or decreasing the number of Reward Items received at the end of a Quest.

armorSkills.skillDescription: Sometimes increases the number of Reward Items received at the end of a Quest.
Often increases the number of Reward Items received at the end of a Quest.
Sometimes decreases the number of Reward Items received at the end of a Quest.
Often decreases the number of Reward Items received at the end of a Quest.

name: Stamina
description: Slows down or Speeds up stamina depletion for actions other than evasion and blocking.

armorSkills.skillDescription: Slows down Stamina depletion for actions other than evasion and blocking.
Speeds up Stamina depletion for actions other than evasion and blocking.

name: Loading
description: Increases the loadable amount of all usable ammo by one.

name: Carving
description: Prevents knockbacks from everything other than Wind Pressure while carving.  Higher levels sometimes boosts number of carving chances.

armorSkills.skillDescription: Prevents knockbacks from everything other than Wind Pressure while carving.
Grants Carving Pro effects and sometimes boosts number of carving chances.

name: Evade Dist
description: Increases evasion distance.

name: Tranquilzr
description: Rewards an additional Capture Reward Item for capturing a monster (no additional item for capturing more monsters of the same type).

name: FastCharge
description: Decreases or increases charging time for charge attacks (Greatswords and Hammers) and gauges (Long Swords  and Switch Axes).

armorSkills.skillDescription: Decreases charging time for charge attacks (Greatswords and Hammers) and gauges (Long Swords and Switch Axes).
Increases charging time for charge attacks charge attacks (Greatswords and Hammers) and gauges (Long Swords and Switch Axes).

name: PunishDraw
description: Grants the ability to stun (KO) monsters with draw attacks.

name: FreeElemnt
description: Releases the latent elemental properties in weapons that don't have elements.

name: Rapid Fire
description: Allows one extra shot to be fired while rapid firing.

name: Poison
description: Prevents or doubles the damage received from poison.

armorSkills.skillDescription: Prevents poison.
Doubles the damage received from poison.

name: Health
description: Increases or decreases maximum Health.

armorSkills.skillDescription: Increases maximum Health by 20.
Increases maximum Health by 50.
Decreases maximum Health by 10.
Decreases maximum Health by 30.

name: Rec Speed
description: Increases or decreases recovery speed from temporary damage (the red portion of the Health Gauge).

armorSkills.skillDescription: Speeds recovery from temporary damage (the red part of the Health Gauge).
Greatly speeds recovery from temporary damage (the red portion of the Health Gauge).
Slows recovery from temporary damage (the red portion of the Health Gauge).
Greatly slows recovery from temporary damage (the red portion of the Health Gauge).

name: Expert
description: Increases or decreases Affinity (chance to deal either 25% more or 25% less damage with a weapon attack).

armorSkills.skillDescription: Increases Affinity by 10% (2.5% effective damage).
Increases Affinity by 20% (5% effective damage).
Increases Affinity by 30% (7.5% effective damage).
Decreases Affinity by 5% (-1.25% effective damage).
Decreases Affinity by 10% (-2.5% effective damage).
Decreases Affinity by 15% (-3.75% effective damage).

name: Sharpener
description: Weapons are sharpened much faster or much longer.

armorSkills.skillDescription: Weapons are sharpened much faster.
Weapons take longer to sharpen.

name: Guard
description: Decrease or increases knockback when blocking attacks, and decreases or increases stamina loss (and damage taken) when blocking heavier attacks.

armorSkills.skillDescription: Decreases knockback when blocking attacks, and decreases stamina loss (and damage taken) when blocking heavier attacks.
Greatly decreases knockback when blocking attacks, and greatly decreases stamina loss (and damage taken) when blocking heavier attacks.
Increases knockback when blocking attacks, and increases stamina loss when blocking heavier attacks.

name: Guard Up
description: Causes previously unblockable attacks to become blockable: Gobul's Water Vortex, Gigginox's Poison Body Slam, Uragaan's Sleep Cloud, Laguiacrus' Massive Electric Discharge, Agnaktor's Firebeam, Ceadeus' Water Blast and Alatreon's Fireball.

description: Increases or decreases Bowgun reloading speed.

Bowgun reloading speed increases 2 levels.
Bowgun reloading speed increases 3 levels.
Bowgun reloading speed decreases 1 level.
Bowgun reloading speed decreases 2 levels.
Bowgun reloading speed decreases 3 levels.

name: Evasion
